name: André Hodeir
description: French violinist, composer, arranger and musicologist (1921-2011)
abstract: André Hodeir (22 January 1921 – 1 November 2011) was a French violinist, composer, arranger and musicologist.

about_quotes.speaker: David N. Baker
about_quotes.evidence: The first books on jazz, by people like André Hodeir and people like that – the fact is, almost all the scholarship on jazz came from Europe
about_quotes.doc_title: David N. Baker — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Schuller Gunther
about_quotes.evidence: The only book that had appeared by that time, just around the same time I was asked, was André Hodeir’s first book on jazz.
about_quotes.doc_title: Schuller Gunther — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: JJ Johnson
about_quotes.evidence: Andre Hodeir once did an in-depth review... He’s commenting about J.J. Johnson’s style and technique
about_quotes.doc_title: JJ Johnson — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
